summary: Testing iteration 14 - Map-to-Combat Integration and ROOK AI Suggestions features verified. All targeted features working correctly. Backend SRD API regression check passed (18/18). Map-Combat integration tests (6/6) and ROOK suggestions tests (5/5) all pass. GM Screen Maps tab functionality confirmed working (14/14 tests pass including new Maps tab tests).

issues: Close button (X) in map selector modal lacks data-testid for easier test targeting. Recommend adding data-testid='close-map-selector-btn'
Dismiss button in ROOK popup lacks data-testid. Recommend adding data-testid='rook-dismiss-btn'

frontend_tests.rook-suggestions.spec.ts: 5 passed - ROOK AI suggestions on Player Dashboard and Combat Page
frontend_tests.gm-screen-tabs.spec.ts: 14 passed - Including new Maps tab tests
frontend_tests.dashboard-features.spec.ts: 5 passed, 2 failed (unrelated to target features - outdated data-testids)

tests: NPCs tab displays add NPC functionality
quarantined_tests.reason: Data-testids changed in CampaignDashboard component - 'setting-tab', 'add-npc-btn' no longer exist. Not related to target features.

action_items: Consider adding data-testid='close-map-selector-btn' to CombatPage.js line 972 for the map selector modal close button
Consider adding data-testid='rook-dismiss-btn' to RookSuggestions.js line 325 for the popup dismiss button
Update dashboard-features.spec.ts with current CampaignDashboard data-testids if those features need testing
seed_data_creation: No test data created. Tests use existing TEST_CAMPAIGN_ID = '1e6a6d0d-ad88-4b8a-9cc5-a1672119343c'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map-to-Combat integration and ROOK AI Suggestions fully verified and working. Key test IDs: TEST_CAMPAIGN_ID = '1e6a6d0d-ad88-4b8a-9cc5-a1672119343c', TEST_MAP_NAME = 'Forest Clearing'. The ROOK suggestion system has a 30-second cooldown between suggestions. GM Screen Maps tab is accessible via data-testid='tab-maps'. Dashboard-features.spec.ts has 2 failing tests due to outdated data-testids in CampaignDashboard - these are not related to Map/ROOK features.

map_to_combat_integration.description: Load Battle Map button appears in combat when maps exist. Clicking opens map selector modal showing available maps with grid dimensions. Selecting a map loads it into combat with success toast and token positioning on canvas.

rook_suggestions_player_dashboard.description: ROOK suggestion popup appears on Player Dashboard after 5-second delay. Popup shows class-specific tips with title, message, and optional tip. Can be manually dismissed and auto-dismisses after timeout.

rook_suggestions_combat.description: ROOK suggestions appear in combat context (triggered at combat_start). Has 30-second cooldown between suggestions.

gm_screen_maps_tab.description: Maps tab visible and accessible in GM Screen. Shows saved maps and Create Map button. Can open Map Builder with canvas.

srd_api_endpoints.description: All SRD endpoints working: spells (39 total), classes (6), races (4), feats (8). Filtering and individual retrieval confirmed.
